reviews.comment:
Los baños muy sucios en el día de hoy

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were very dirty today
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxeHVuQ1pREAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre los baños sucios, los papeles desbordados y todo el piso mojado. Si es por el mal uso, pero muy poca limpieza de parte de la estación.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are always dirty, the toilet paper is overflowing, and the entire floor is wet. It's due to misuse, but the station is also very poorly maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxbXRHT2F3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pocos empleados para la gente que había, no use los baños y los precios un poquito que decirte, no sabes si es el precio o te están estafando... 1050 pesos una Coca chica

(Translated by Google)
There were few employees for the number of people there. I didn't use the restrooms. The prices are a bit confusing. You don't know if it's the price or if you're being ripped off... 1050 pesos for a small Coke.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxZ3F2OGhBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Un desastre los baños. Falta matencion. Es dable mencionar que se ve que están haciendo mantentenimiento en algunos sectores.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are a disaster. They lack maintenance. It's worth mentioning that some areas are being serviced.
